diagnosis: The platforming layout worked cleanly — zero deaths, no falls, and a quick 24s clear shows the jumps were readable and well-paced with no unfair gaps. But the level is a pure traversal exercise with nothing to fight or react to, so there's no tension or challenge, hence the low rating despite a successful run.
lessons: A level with clean platforming but zero enemies or hazards can still feel flat and low-fun even with a perfect, fast clear — traversal alone isn't enough stimulation.
Fast completion time with zero deaths/falls signals the level was too easy/under-stimulating rather than well-tuned.
